_description: 7-gate renewal lifecycle framework. Source of truth for lib/evaluate_gates.py. Derived from 17 Core Renewals playbooks (April 2026).
_note: All day counts are relative to Renewal_Date__c. Negative = before renewal, positive = after.

gate_0.name: Data readiness
gate_0.description: Opportunity data is complete and accurate before outreach begins.

violation.trigger: Required fields remain blank after closes_days deadline
violation.escalation: VP notified — outreach cannot begin with incomplete data

gate_1.name: Outreach activation
gate_1.description: Customer has been contacted and has responded. Stage should advance beyond Pending/Outreach.

pass_criteria.comment: Pass when stage >= Engaged, OR LastActivityDate is within the gate window, OR a completed task exists in activity data.

violation.trigger: Stage is still Pending or Outreach with no activity after closes_days
violation.escalation: VP notified. For AR accounts: begin AR preparation track. For non-AR: plan T-5 final warning.

gate_1.hvo_exception: HVO accounts skip automated outreach. ISR/ERM initiates manual outreach at T-120.

gate_2.name: Discovery and needs assessment
gate_2.description: Discovery call completed, pain points documented, account categorised. Aligns with AR 60-day notice deadline.

pass_criteria.comment: Pass when Probable_Outcome__c is not null/Undetermined AND stage >= Engaged AND there is activity within the window.

violation.trigger: No discovery evidence by T-60. This is also the AR notice deadline.
violation.escalation: Gate violation date populated. VP notified. For AR accounts: notice period has expired — AR is enforceable from this point.

ar_notice_deadline.comment: Standard 60-day AR clause. After this date, customer cannot cancel if AR clause exists.

gate_3.name: Proposal and pricing
gate_3.description: Quote created, approved, and sent to customer.

pass_criteria.comment: Pass when stage indicates a quote has been sent (Proposal or beyond).

violation.trigger: No quote sent by T-30. AR invoice auto-fires for eligible accounts.
violation.escalation: AR invoice fires automatically at T-30 if: AR clause exists, no signed quote, opp still open, opp not in Finalizing, no formal cancellation, no approved exception.

gate_4.name: Negotiation and follow-up
gate_4.description: Customer has received quote and is progressing toward signature or disposition.

pass_criteria.comment: Pass when opportunity has reached Finalizing or is closed.

violation.trigger: No signed quote or commitment by T-7.
violation.escalation: Execute AR at T-7 if clause exists. For non-AR unresponsive: Closed-Lost at T+0.
violation.final_warning_note: Send T-5 business day warning for non-AR unresponsive customers (Scenario #9).

gate_5.name: Close execution
gate_5.description: Opportunity is closed (Won, Lost, or Won't Process) with all required artifacts.

violation.trigger: Opportunity not closed by T+0 (renewal date).
violation.escalation: Immediate VP escalation. No opportunity should remain open past renewal date without approved extension.

gate_6.name: Post-close QC and feedback
gate_6.description: Closed opportunity passes quality check. Loss reasons validated. Learnings captured.

pass_criteria.comment: Evaluation layer: flag if closed opp has missing Loss Reason (for lost), missing Win Type (for won), or missing description.

violation.trigger: QC not completed within 5 business days of close.
violation.escalation: Escalate to VP for QC review.

scenario_routing._comment: Maps gate state + signals to one of the 10 closing scenarios.

risk_signals.no_activity_comment: Flag if LastActivityDate is older than this many days and opp is not closed.
risk_signals.no_follow_up_comment: Flag if Next_Follow_Up_Date__c is in the past or null for open opps inside the 90-day window.
